title: Zero to One
author: Peter Thiel
annotation: Half of this is wrong, but the half that's right changed how I think about building.

title: The Founders Podcast
author: David Senra
annotation: If I could only listen to one podcast for the rest of my life it would be this. Michael Dell, Ken Griffin, and Tiger Woods are among my favorite episodes.

title: High Agency
author: George Mack
annotation: This essay changed my life. The concept seems obvious, but it had never been fully articulated to me as an 18 year old.

title: Feathered Indians
author: Tyler Childers
annotation: Hearing Childers's response to his partner's disapproval makes me imagine what type of person I'd have to meet for me to leave certain things behind.

title: The Lessons of History
author: Will & Ariel Durant
annotation: Every era thinks it invented hubris. Read this and feel appropriately small.

title: Mere Christianity
author: C.S. Lewis
annotation: The book that met me where I was when I had no Christian community around me.
